intro.text: It is impossible to describe in words the glory of the Shrut (scripture) on the strength of which the Shasan (order) is going to remain victorious for 21,000 years. Under the guidance of Pujya Kripanath, hundreds of Shramans and Shraminis are working hard to protect it by giving thousands of hours. A small glimpse of the ancient Shrut publication done by Adhyatm Parivar as a beautiful result of which:

gallery.caption: These texts have reached the hands of Geetharths through the hard work of hundreds of hours.

adhyatmGyantirth.metaTitle: Adhyatm Gyantirth : Collection, Amendment, Publication | Jinagam Vibhag

header.title: Adhyatm Gyantirth : Collection, Amendment, Publication
header.subtitle: A four-storey building for various activities of protection of ancient and modern Shrut knowledge

images.building: Four-storey Shrutprasad built only and only for Shrut works
images.workshop: Take a look at the main workshop of this Gyan Tirth once

collection.title: Collection :
collection.text: Rare books are collected here by high range scanning machines from Germany.

amendment.title: Amendment :
amendment.text: Based on the purification done by the revered ones, the amended texts are printed here and a huge Shrut collection is prepared. To reach the transliterated texts to the Geetarth Guru Bhagwants, the skilled staff here makes the texts printable by composing and proofreading very carefully.

publication.title: Publication :
publication.text: 319 texts have been published till date. This process is going on continuously. Currently a staff of 21 people is working here. It is our heart's desire that this number keeps increasing!

arvachinShrutPrakashan.metaTitle: Modern Shrut Publication-Shrut Propagation | Jinagam Vibhag

header.title: Modern Shrut Publication-Shrut Propagation
header.subtitle: Publication work of books of discourses etc. of guide Suribhagwant

bulletPoints: From whose discourses on an average one Diksha is being created every 10 to 15 days.
The words which have kept the Shraman-Shramini class safe from the poisonous air of Kalikal.
The daily useful literature which has become the breath of the worshipers.
The new creation which is soaked in devotion and detachment, such series of literature is being published by Adhyatm Parivar.

featured.title: A glimpse of various Shrut works...
featured.p1: Lakhs of pages of thousands of manuscripts containing such medieval works are in a dilapidated condition.
featured.p2: Which perhaps no one has even picked up in the last 250 years.
featured.p3: Hundreds of Shraman-Shraminis under the guidance of Pujya Kripanath are working hard to make this vast literature accessible to Geetarths.
featured.p4: Beautiful fruits of which are being offered in the lotus hands of Shri Sangh.

adhyatmParichay.title: Adhyatm Introduction
adhyatmParichay.text: How many streams of ancient Shrut, modern Shrut etc. are there in this Shrut Yatra started by Adhyatm Parivar for the last 16-17 years? So how many milestones has the journey crossed? What is the future destination of this journey? To know many such things, here is... Small in size but huge in information booklet :

gyansetu.text: This is the issue of Gyansetu published every month. Through this, Adhyatm Parivar makes a beautiful bouquet of information about the book flowers blooming every month in the garden of the entire Jinshasan and delivers it to the Gyan Bhandars and the Shrut Rasik Chaturvidh Sangh.

ganipitakNirmaanPrasar.text: According to these lines, just as Jinbimb and his servant Adhishthayaks are established in Jinalaya, similarly for the establishment of Shri Ganipitak in the form of Jinagam establishment and Saraswati Devi, the presiding deity of speech, in Pathshala etc., construction of marble Shri Ganipitak and its propagation is being done by Adhyatm Parivar.
ganipitakNirmaanPrasar.caption: Such eye-catching Shri Ganipitaks have been installed at many places.

haribhadrasuriShastraSangrah.metaTitle: Haribhadrasuri Shastra Sangrah : Achievement of Shrut for Shri Sangh | Jinagam Vibhag

header.title: Haribhadrasuri Shastra Sangrah : Achievement of Shrut for Shri Sangh

haribhadrasuriShastraSangrah.intro: A glimpse of this Gyan Bhandar located in Surat, which in a short span of just six years has come to be counted in the advanced class not only in Surat but in the whole of India, is presented here, yet there is a lot left to tell which you will be able to know only by visiting.

captions.shelves: In these 373 cupboards, the knowledge wealth of the omniscient Lord has been kept safe so that termites and dampness do not affect it.
captions.books: Today, whose figure is more than 1.25 lakhs, these texts and books are dearer than life to the knowledge seekers.
captions.window: Books can be obtained from this window daily from 9:00 am to 7:00 pm. That too in just 2 minutes!
captions.statue: 1007 Sadhu-Sadhviji Bhagwant and 1184 Shravak-Shravika class have used this Shastra Sangrah. Are you left?
